markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on onboarding progress, content planning, and new reporting tools.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content OS:** GrowthX's Airtable "Content OS" will provide the CMO-requested visibility into the content pipeline, replacing the prior calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [**Calibration Article:** The first article, due EOD Friday, is a critical test of GrowthX's tone, voice, and structure before production ramps to 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [**AI Analytics:** GrowthX's "Check That" platform will track Parloa's citation share in LLM responses; Dora will provide specific prompts to ensure the data is relevant.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [**SEO Analytics:** A Looker dashboard will consolidate SEO data from Google Search Console, GA, and SEMrush for a unified view of performance.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)

## Topics

### Content Planning & Visibility

  - [Dora needs a clear content plan for her CMO, who requires visibility into the pipeline to manage anxiety about the unknown.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [GrowthX's "Content OS" (Airtable) will provide this visibility, replacing the previous calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
      - [**Structure:** Organizes content by topic clusters (e.g., comparisons).](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
      - [**Details:** Shows status, keyword data (search volume, difficulty), and priority.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
      - [**Customization:** A "view by persona" can be added once Dora provides the persona definitions from the PMM team.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)

### Onboarding & Production Ramp-Up

  - [**Product Walkthrough:** Completed with Parloa's paid search agency, Lionhurst. The session was helpful but remained at a high level.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [**Calibration Article:** The first article is in production, with a senior engineer tweaking the pipeline to ensure quality.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
      - [**Due:** EOD Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
      - [**Purpose:** To test and validate GrowthX's writing style and structure.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
  - [**Production Schedule:**](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [**Week 1:** 3 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [**Week 2+:** 5 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)

### Analytics & Reporting

  - [**"Check That" (AI Analytics):** GrowthX's platform tracks Parloa's citation share in LLM responses.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
      - [**Data:** Shows prompts tracked, responses, platforms, and citation share over time.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
      - [**Goal:** Provide concrete data on how Parloa's content is being used by AI.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
      - [**Action:** Dora will provide specific prompts to ensure the data answers key questions (e.g., competitor benchmarks).](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [**SEO Analytics (Looker Dashboard):** A separate dashboard will consolidate traditional SEO data.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
      - [**Sources:** Google Search Console, GA, and SEMrush.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Provide a unified view of organic performance.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)

### Other Updates

  - [**Current SEO Content:** An external agency is managing content based on a strategy from the previous content manager.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
      - [**Plan:** Wind this down once GrowthX is fully onboarded and repurpose the budget for executive bylines and ebooks.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [**2026 Traffic Goal:** Dora will share the new organic traffic goal, which is a real estate goal (not paid-driven like the 10x growth in 2025).](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [**Noble (Paid Placement):** Dora was approached by Noble for paid article placements.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
      - [**GrowthX's Take:** Neutral. Potential for backlinks and thought leadership, but Parloa's domain authority is already strong. GrowthX can produce content for this if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
      - [Deliver calibration article (EOD Friday).](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
      - [Share link to the Content OS Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
      - [Set up "Check That" and the Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [**Dora:**](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
      - [Review calibration article and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [Send specific LLM prompts to William for "Check That" setup.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Provide persona definitions from the PMM team.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [Share the 2026 organic traffic goal.](https://fathom.video/share/V6FCLWKTjEG287mULomzbv4UXPsy-mke?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
